headline: S&P 500 at critical crossroads
detail: The market is at a technical inflection point where a break lower could accelerate selling. Your book is 90% tech and chip names on margin — a broader market rollover hits you harder than most. This is the macro backdrop for every position you own.

headline: Fed's Goolsbee: Inflation still too high
detail: Chicago Fed's Goolsbee pushed back on rate-cut optimism, saying inflation remains too elevated. High-multiple growth names like PLTR and CRWD are especially sensitive to rate expectations staying higher for longer. This adds fundamental pressure on top of your technical sell signals.

headline: Microsoft historic June rout on spending concerns
detail: Microsoft is having its worst June stretch in memory as investors balk at AI infrastructure costs. This sentiment can bleed into the broader tech and chip trade — AVGO, PLTR, and CRWD all live in the same risk bucket investors are selling. Watch for contagion into your names.

headline: ON Semiconductor buys Synaptics for $7 billion
detail: A major chip-sector M&A deal signals continued consolidation and confidence in physical AI as a theme. This is modestly positive color for chip names like AVGO and the SMH ETF you hold. Not an immediate price mover but confirms the longer-term demand narrative for your sector.
